allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const html=fs.readFileSync\(''index.html'',''utf8''\); console.log\(''page-survey exists:'', html.includes\(''id=""page-survey""''\)\); console.log\(''survey-form-body exists:'', html.includes\(''id=""survey-form-body""''\)\); console.log\(''survey-rating-table exists:'', html.includes\(''survey-rating-table''\)\);")
